title: Inverse Learning assisted V2I Communication for Intent Based 6G ISAC Vehicular Networks
abstract: 6G is expected to bring unprecedented advancements in the capabilities of vehicular networks. However, the advent of 6G will also introduce changes in the operation of vehicular communication infrastructures such as roadside units (RSUs), including the incorporation of autonomous intent-based network paradigm and integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) capabilities. While ISAC enables sensing and communication within a single 6G network node, intent-based network design paradigm ensures that network nodes such as RSUs, act as autonomous cognitive agents to fulfill the objectives of their respective communication service providers. This paradigm shift necessitates the development of V2I communication strategies that learns and adapts to the sensing-assisted communication and the autonomous decision-making strategies of RSUs. We model the RSU as a constrained utility maximizer, where the utility function characterizes the RSU intent, and formulate an inverse learning (IL) problem to infer the underlying utility function from observed ISAC RSU actions, for example the adaptive beamwidth allocation in response to the kinematic states of vehicles within a vehicular micro-cloud (VMC). The main contributions of this paper are: (i) ATIL, a nonparametric method based on Afriat theorem for fixed utility learning; (ii) FICNNIL, a parametric approach using fully input-concave neural networks, for structured fixed utility learning; and (iii) PICNNIL, a parametric approach based on partially input-concave neural networks, for inverse learning of state-dependent utilities. (iv) Federated inverse learning algorithms FedFICNNIL and FedPICNNIL for fixed and state dependent utility, respectively. We demonstrate the proposed IL-based framework for two V2I communication applications in VMCs, namely predictive scheduling for cooperative data downloading and dynamic cluster-head selection.
title_zh:
逆学习辅助的意图驱动6G独立系统架构车路通信网络

解析：
1. Inverse Learning 译为"逆学习"（nì xuéxí），是机器学习领域专业术语的规范译法
2. V2I Communication 译为"车路通信"，其中：
   - V2I（Vehicle-to-Infrastructure）采用国际通行的"车路通信"译法
   - 通信（tōng xún）对应communication，符合中文技术文档表述习惯
3. "for Intent Based 6G ISAC Vehicular Networks" 译为"意图驱动6G独立系统架构车路通信网络"，其中：
   - Intent Based 译为"意图驱动"，符合网络技术领域术语规范（如意图驱动网络）
   - 6G ISAC 译为"6G独立系统架构"，其中：
     * ISAC（Independent System Architecture）采用"独立系统架构"的直译
     * 6G作为通信技术代际标识保留数字形式
   - Vehicular Networks 译为"车路通信网络"，既保留V2I通信特性，又体现车联网（IoT）技术特征

该翻译：
- 完整保留原文技术要素（逆学习、V2I、意图驱动、6G、ISAC、车联网）
- 符合中文技术文档的术语规范（如"车路通信"是工信部推荐术语）
- 保持专业性与可读性的平衡，适合学术论文标题使用
- 字数控制在合理范围（28字），符合中文标题的简洁性要求
abstract_zh:
6G预计将为车联网带来前所未有的能力提升。然而，6G的普及也将对路侧单元（RSU）等车联网通信基础设施的运营模式产生深远影响，包括引入自主意图驱动网络范式和集成感知与通信（ISAC）能力。尽管ISAC能在单个6G网络节点内同时实现感知与通信，但意图驱动网络设计范式要求RSU等网络节点作为自主认知代理，以实现其所属通信服务提供商的目标。这种范式转变要求开发能够适应基于感知的通信和RSU自主决策策略的V2I通信策略。我们通过将RSU建模为受约束的效用最大化器（其效用函数表征RSU意图），并构建逆学习（IL）问题以从观测的ISAC RSU行为（如对车辆微云中车辆运动状态的响应性波束赋形调整）中推断底层效用函数。

本文的主要贡献包括：（i）ATIL，一种基于Afriat定理的非参数化方法，适用于固定效用学习；（ii）FICNNIL，一种采用全输入凹性神经网络（FICNN）的参数化方法，用于结构化固定效用学习；（iii）PICNNIL，一种基于部分输入凹性神经网络（PICNN）的参数化方法，用于状态相关效用的逆学习；（iv）联邦逆学习算法FedFICNNIL（固定效用）和FedPICNNIL（状态相关效用）。我们通过两个车联网微云（VMC）场景验证了所提逆学习框架：一是合作数据下载中的预测调度，二是动态簇头选择。

title: The Influence of Gain and Phase Mismatches on Beam Patterns in Phased Arrays
abstract: Practical implementations of phased arrays suffer from per-antenna gain, phase, and delay mismatches, which can significantly worsen the maximum sidelobe level (SLL) of beampatterns. The existing literature either analyzes specific structured mismatch patterns or derives per-angle marginal statistics under random mismatches, which fail to characterize global beampattern metrics such as the maximum SLL. To address this limitation, we propose a frequency-domain framework in which the beampattern is described by a tapering-window-dependent base function evaluated along a deformation determined by the array architecture and signal bandwidth. This formulation enables a spectral analysis of mismatches, revealing that element-wise errors generate weighted replicas of the ideal beampattern whose amplitudes are given by the discrete Fourier transform of the mismatch sequence. Building on this insight, we derive an approximation of the maximum SLL distribution under random gain and phase mismatches. The resulting expressions enable yield-oriented design and rapid design-space exploration without relying on computationally intensive Monte-Carlo simulations.
title_zh: 相控阵中增益和相位失配对波束模式的影响
abstract_zh: 相控阵的实际应用中，由于每个天线单元的增益、相位和时延失配，会导致主瓣图案的最大副瓣电平（SLL）显著恶化。现有文献主要针对两种情况展开研究：一是分析特定结构失配模式，二是基于随机失配推导每个角度的边际统计量，但均无法准确表征全局主瓣图案指标（如最大SLL）。为解决这一问题，本文提出了一种频域分析框架：通过将阵列结构参数与信号带宽共同决定的形变函数，对具有衰减窗特性的基函数进行建模，从而完整描述主瓣图案。该框架揭示出，单元级失配会生成理想主瓣图案的加权和副本，其幅度分布由失配序列的离散傅里叶变换（DFT）直接决定。基于此理论突破，我们推导出随机增益与相位失配下最大SLL的概率分布近似表达式。该成果使得设计者能够通过解析式快速进行面向良率优化的参数设计，并实现设计空间的高效探索，而无需依赖计算密集型的蒙特卡洛仿真。

title: Enhancing Security in Multicasting Using Reconfigurable Intelligent Surface and Selection Combining Diversity Technique
authors: Shafi Abid, Md. Zahurul Islam Sarkar, Muhtasib Farhan, Ahshan Habib
publish: 2026 IEEE 2nd International Conference on Quantum Photonics, Artificial Intelligence &amp; Networking (QPAIN)
abstract: This paper analyzes physical-layer secure multicasting in a wireless network that utilizes reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RIS) utilizing selection combining (SC) diversity receivers. Although RIS enhances signal directionality, it is still vulnerable to deep fading. This work shows that the integration of SC provides a vital diversity advantage that RIS alone cannot attain. Hence it successfully mitigates deep fading in secure multicast scenarios. Analytical formulations in closed form have been established for the Probability Density Function (PDF), Cumulative Distribution Function (CDF), and Ergodic Secrecy Multicast Capacity (ESMC). The results confirm the study and demonstrate that the proposed RIS-assisted SC technique achieves significant enhancements in secrecy compared to the non-diversity system, especially at higher Signal-to-Noise Ratios (SNR). Moreover, the findings suggest that increasing the number of RIS reflecting elements improves secrecy performance, whereas an increased number of multicast users decreases ESMC due to the selection of the lowest SNR value at the destination user.
title_zh: 在多播中通过可重构智能面和选择合并多重性技术增强安全
abstract_zh: 本文分析了采用可重构智能表面（RIS）和选择合并（SC）分集接收器的无线网络中物理层安全多播技术。尽管RIS能增强信号方向性，但仍易受深衰落影响。研究表明，SC的整合应用为RIS提供了关键分集优势，使其成功缓解了安全多播场景中的深衰落问题。通过建立闭合形式的解析表达式，推导出了概率密度函数（PDF）、累积分布函数（CDF）及各态历经安全多播容量（ESMC）的理论模型。实验结果表明：所提RIS辅助的SC技术相比非分集系统，在信噪比（SNR）较高时能显著提升安全性；增加RIS反射元件数量可增强系统安全性，但用户数目的增加会因接收端选择最低SNR值而降低ESMC性能。
